runs.note: Implemented rate limiting for login endpoint with IP+username keying, 5 attempts per 10-minute window, exponential backoff (1/5/15 min), successful login reset, rate limit headers, and audit logging. Refresh token endpoint remains unaffected to preserve mobile app compatibility.
